members.name: GetMinimumLibraryInitializationLevel
members.summary: Returns the lowest level required for this extension to be properly initialized (see the [enum InitializationLevel] enum).

members.name: IsLibraryOpen
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this extension's library has been opened.

values.name: INITIALIZATION_LEVEL_CORE
values.summary: The library is initialized at the same time as the core features of the engine.

values.name: INITIALIZATION_LEVEL_EDITOR
values.summary: The library is initialized at the same time as the engine's editor classes. Only happens when loading the GDExtension in the editor.

values.name: INITIALIZATION_LEVEL_SCENE
values.summary: The library is initialized at the same time as the engine's scene-related classes.

values.name: INITIALIZATION_LEVEL_SERVERS
values.summary: The library is initialized at the same time as the engine's servers (such as [RenderingServer] or [PhysicsServer3D]).

constants.name: INITIALIZATION_LEVEL_CORE
constants.summary: The library is initialized at the same time as the core features of the engine.

constants.name: INITIALIZATION_LEVEL_SERVERS
constants.summary: The library is initialized at the same time as the engine's servers (such as [RenderingServer] or [PhysicsServer3D]).

constants.name: INITIALIZATION_LEVEL_SCENE
constants.summary: The library is initialized at the same time as the engine's scene-related classes.

constants.name: INITIALIZATION_LEVEL_EDITOR
constants.summary: The library is initialized at the same time as the engine's editor classes. Only happens when loading the GDExtension in the editor.
